name: indico-plugin-previewer-code

metadata.name: indico-plugin-previewer-code
metadata.summary: Syntax highlighter for code attachments in Indico

documentation:
# Code Preview Plugin

This plugin adds syntax highlighting (using the Pygments syntax highlighter)
to event materials that look like source code files.

The following languages are supported:

- C / C++
- C#
- CSS
- Fortran
- Java
- JavaScript
- PHP
- Python
- Ruby

## Changelog

### 3.3

- Support (and require) Python 3.12

### 3.2.1

- Support Python 3.11

### 3.2

- Declare compatibility with Python 3.10

### 3.0

- Initial release for Indico 3.0

modules.name: indico_previewer_code
documentation: Syntax highlighting for common programming languages and related formats.
